notes: Bowdoin College town. 4 bookstores, 2 record stores, world-class art museum (free), James Beard semifinalist coffee bar, 4 breweries. Strongest creative/food scene after Portland.

notes: One of the most culturally rich small towns in New England. 4 bookstores, record store (Turn It Up!), Stone Church, Latchis Art Deco cinema, 5 art galleries, museum. VT's longest-running farmers market. Milder winters.
